Name: LYNX
Desc:
3-piece set effect: Wearer's HP Treatment Efficiency <@ba.vup>+20.0%</>. 
After the wearer gives HP treatment to an allied target, that target also gains <@ba.vup>15.000000000000002%</> DMG Reduction against all types of DMG for 10s. If the said treatment exceeds the target's Max HP, the target gains <@ba.vup>30.000000000000004%</> DMG Reduction against all types of DMG. The aforementioned effects cannot stack.
